items.original_body: I am a newbie to Directus. I have created a simple test blog collection with title, content and organisation. I am trying to set a field preset using the current role of a user. I have created my role, I select use custom on create. I am then using ``` { "organisation": "$CURRENT_ROLE" } ``` I assume this is the correct format, please correct me if it is wrong. When I open the App and go to create a new blog the field "organisation" is populated. The issue is that it does not save the field value. If I say the field is required it then shows value is required. This even happens when it is just a text field. --- ### Project details Directus Version: 9.0.0-rc.40 Environment: production OS: macOS Catalina (10.15) Node: 14.15.5

items.original_body:
**Describe the bug**

```text
2021-03-21 10:56:13 ERROR (zeroconf-ServiceBrowser__googlecast._tcp.local._264) [root] Uncaught thread exception
Traceback (most recent call last):
 File "/usr/local/lib/python3.8/threading.py", line 932, in _bootstrap_inner
 self.run()
 File "/usr/local/lib/python3.8/site-packages/zeroconf/__init__.py", line 1760, in run
 self._service_state_changed.fire(
 File "/usr/local/lib/python3.8/site-packages/zeroconf/__init__.py", line 1513, in fire
 h(**kwargs)
 File "/usr/local/lib/python3.8/site-packages/zeroconf/__init__.py", line 1618, in on_change
 listener.remove_service(*args)
AttributeError: 'CastListener' object has no attribute 'remove_service'
```

See this link [Homeassistant/core#48117](https://github.com/home-assistant/core/issues/48117)

**To Reproduce**

Appears first time i restart, but only once.

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

No error message.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.

items.original_body:
[Crash_2021_1_29_15-48-57.txt](https://github.com/PierreDespereaux/Keizaal/files/5896975/Crash_2021_1_29_15-48-57.txt)
[Crash_2021_1_29_15-46-7.txt](https://github.com/PierreDespereaux/Keizaal/files/5896976/Crash_2021_1_29_15-46-7.txt)

**Keizaal version**
4.0.0

**Describe the bug**
Used Skyrim Unbound on random location start. Started me in Riften. When I leave Riften (to Skyrim) through any gate it causes a CTD.

**To reproduce**
Start in Riften via Skyrim Unbound. Leave Riften through any gate.

**Expected behavior**
Expected behavior is to be loaded into the open world outside Riften.

**Screenshots**
N/A

**Additional context**
Tried other gates. Same result.

items.original_title: Apply All button resets all column filter fields
items.original_body:
1. Which driver are you using and version of it (Ex: PostgreSQL 10.0):
MySQL 5.x

2. Which TablePlus build number are you using (the number on the welcome screen, Ex: build 81):
Version 3.12.6 (Build 366)

3. The steps to reproduce this issue:
I'll have some field filters, some used and some unchecked. Then I'll uncheck them all to just refresh the entire table i have open and then I'll click on Apply All so I don't have to refresh the whole connection. All of the individual fields reset to the top field name in the drop down. 

Noted: If the bug is related to data, please attach an example SQL data.
items.mutated_title: Apply All button resets all column filter fields as a single action.
items.mutated_body:
1. Which driver are you using and version of it (Ex: PostgreSQL 10.0):
MySQL 5.x

2. Which TablePlus build number are you using (the number on the welcome screen, Ex: build 81):
Version 3.12.6 (Build 366)

3. The steps to reproduce this issue:
I'll have some field filters, some used and some unchecked. Then I'll uncheck them all to just refresh the entire table i have open and then I'll click on Apply All so I don't have to refresh the whole connection. All of the individual fields reset to the top field name in the drop down. 

Noted: If the bug is related to data, please attach an example SQL data.

items.original_body:
Trying to instantiate a new bootstrap select when using BS5 gives this error. I realize BS5 is still alpha but this is something to keep an eye on. Hopefully it is a simple fix in the constructor.

```
TypeError: undefined is not an object (evaluating 'C.dropdown._menu=C.$menu[0]')
```

thanks
